commit.subject: LU-17356 tests: enable project quota for files
commit.message:
LU-17356 tests: enable project quota for files

Check that MDT doesn't fail with below panic when enable
project quota:

  qmt_sarr_get_idx()) ASSERTION( arr_idx <
    qpi->qpi_sarr.osts.op_count && arr_idx >= 0 )
    failed: idx invalid 0 op_count 0

Test-Parameters: fortestonly trivial testlist=conf-sanity env=ONLY=33d
Signed-off-by: Sergey Cheremencev <scherementsev@ddn.com>
Change-Id: Id8ac5364916e43e55c03425ceb5b234d1b40b452
